title: Golden Globes 2026 Highlights and Winners - Hollywood Reporter
text: The 2026 Golden Globes ceremony highlighted major winners across film and television. Best Picture Drama went to Hamnet with Chloé Zhao's direction. Best Film Musical or Comedy went to One Battle After Another, also winning Best Director and Best Screenplay for Paul Thomas Anderson. Best Cinematic and Box Office Achievement went to Sinners. Best Animated Movie went to KPop Demon Hunters. Best Supporting Actor Drama went to Stellan Skarsgård for Sentimental Value. In television, Best Drama Series went to The Pitt with Noah Wyle winning Best Actor Drama, and Best Comedy Series went to The Studio with Seth Rogen winning Best Actor Comedy. Best Limited Series went to Adolescence. Wagner Moura won Best Actor Drama for The Secret Agent, making historic recognition for Brazilian cinema.
